title: Gravity Guns Datapack
description: Adds Gravity Guns from Half Life into Minecraft
body:
# Gravity Guns Datapack

Bring the iconic gravity gun mechanics into vanilla Minecraft!

This datapack adds multiple **Gravity Gun variants** that let you pick up, move, and launch blocks and entities with ease. Even works with containers and chests. Everything fully multiplayer compatible!

From a balanced survival version to an extremely powerful creative variant, this datapack turns Minecraft physics into a playground.

**Make sure to also download the required resourcepack**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bFLh1MuoGsE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Gravity Guns

This datapack includes **three different gravity gun variants**:

### Default Gravity Gun
- Balanced for survival gameplay  
- Pick up and move blocks or entities
- Transport chests with their content  
- Launch objects with force  
- Craftable in survival  

### Supercharged Gravity Gun
- Much stronger pulling force  
- Launch objects significantly farther    
- More expensive survival recipe  

### Creative Gravity Gun
- Extremely powerful for sandbox fun  
- Massive launch strength  
- Designed for creative mode and experimentation  
- **Not craftable intentionally**
